title: Quran, Sura 55: Ar-Rahman
description: Sura 55 (Ar-Rahman: The Most Gracious) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 55 (Ar-Rahman: The Most Gracious) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: The Most Gracious. He taught the Quran. He created man. He taught him eloquence. The sun and the moon move by precise calculation. And the stars and trees prostrate. Which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
